name: Ryan Laird
title: Founder & Director at Green Orbit Digital
roles: Founder & Director at Green Orbit Digital

about.greeting: 👋 Hi, my name is Ryan Laird.
about.current_role: 💼 Founder and Director of Green Orbit Digital, leading sustainable marketing and communications work for space-sector and mission-driven organisations.
about.specialization: 🚀 I combine physics, astrophysics, space-sector knowledge, marketing, PR, and digital strategy to communicate complex ideas clearly and drive measurable engagement.
about.education: 🎓 Studied Physics with Astrophysics at the University of Leicester and completed postgraduate work in astronomy, science communication, and digital marketing.
about.experience: 🏆 Over a decade of experience across the space industry, science communication, editorial work, marketing, outreach, and project delivery.
